name: Easiest Cheesecake Ever
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together the cream cheese, sugar, and milk. Reserve 2 tablespoons of the candy bits.
2. Mix the remaining candy bits into the cream cheese mixture.
3. Fold in the frozen whipped topping.
4. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pie crust.
5. Refrigerate for 4 hours before serving.
6. Before serving, sprinkle the reserved candy bits on top of the cheesecake.
7. If Bits-O-Brikle is not available, use finely crushed Heath or Skor candy bars.
From Mr. Food Television program posted (with apologies) by Bud Cloyd.
